title: Fix CI failures after console snapshot
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Scope: fix CI failures (python beads compatibility list output, console-ui env for taskulus cli, rust coverage gate). Progress: python beads mode fixed by showing full beads IDs when beads_compatibility config is enabled.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Updated console dev server to use TASKULUS_PYTHON default python3 (override via env) and fixed beads list output to show full bead IDs when beads_compatibility is enabled. Verified beads_mode.feature:75 passes.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: CI: added Python setup to console-ui workflow; black reformatted cli.py after beads list output change.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted console dev server env defaults to allow CONSOLE_PROJECT_ROOT override in CI tests; fixed beads list output to show short IDs only when --beads flag used.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Fixed ruff F841 in cli.py; beads mode forced flag now only used in list command.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Starting CI fix: focus on python coverage gaps and rust coverage gate. Will add BDD scenarios/steps to cover missing lines and investigate rust coverage failures. Running tests under conda py311.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Goal: make CI green after console snapshot changes. Acceptance: all quality gates pass locally (black/ruff, cargo fmt/clippy, behave, cargo test cucumber, coverage gates 100% for python and rust, spec parity), and CI passes in GitHub Actions.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Rust coverage fixed by removing unreachable defaults mapping branch in config_loader. Updated console_ui_steps task issue initializer fields. Tests: cargo test --test cucumber, cargo clippy -- -D warnings, cargo fmt --check, cargo tarpaulin --engine llvm --tests --test cucumber --implicit-test-threads --exclude-files src/bin/* --exclude-files features/steps/* --out Xml --output-dir /tmp/coverage-rust, python tools/coverage_gate.py /tmp/coverage-rust/cobertura.xml --minimum 100, python tools/check_spec_parity.py.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Additional tests: python -m black --check python, python -m ruff check python, python -m coverage run --source=taskulus -m behave, python -m coverage xml -o /tmp/coverage-python/coverage.xml, python tools/coverage_gate.py /tmp/coverage-python/coverage.xml --minimum 100.
